title: Black Medieval ModPack
description: Medival Dungeons and Dragons AddItems World Generation
body:
# **BlackMedieval Modpack** 

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7489777a39a393e007a0a15d52bcd2ba71ab3aca.webp)

Project Overview


[Millenaire Mod SRC](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/millenaire)



BlackMedieval Modpack is a Minecraft modpack designed to immerse players in a medieval-themed world. Built on Minecraft Forge 1.12.2, this modpack combines various mods to create an authentic medieval experience, featuring realistic combat, historic architecture, and engaging quests. Whether you want to live the life of a knight, a craftsman, or a ruler, BlackMedieval offers a rich environment for your adventures.

Authentic Medieval Setting: Explore a world filled with medieval castles, villages, and dungeons.
Enhanced Combat Mechanics: Engage in realistic swordplay and archery with mods that add depth to Minecraft's combat system.
Crafting and Building: Construct and furnish buildings using medieval-themed blocks, furniture, and decorations.
Dynamic Quests and Adventures: Embark on quests that challenge your combat and survival skills, inspired by medieval lore.
Custom NPCs: Interact with NPCs that bring the world to life, offering quests, trades, and stories.
